headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk (reputational or indirect only) — Adani's USD 100 Bn AI infrastructure pledge signals board ambition but limited direct ESG impact for Adani Power
what_matters: No P/E compression, margin erosion, or revenue at risk identified.
BRSR, GRI, COSO ERM, DJSI, ESRS frameworks triggered at group level; no new regulatory deadlines or penalties for Adani Power.
No direct impact on cost of capital, bond spreads, or FII outflow for Adani Power.
